channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Queen was ‘very keen’ for Andrew to take on trade role, memo reveals, as documents released – politics live
item.description: Queen was ‘very keen’ for Andrew to take on trade role, memo reveals, as documents released – politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: People in Britain can't afford a good life, Burnham says
item.description: People in Britain can't afford a good life, Burnham says

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham to back electoral reform if he becomes prime minister
item.description: Andy Burnham to back electoral reform if he becomes prime minister

item.title: BBC Politics: Wes Streeting pledges 'wealth tax that works'
item.description: Wes Streeting pledges 'wealth tax that works'

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Case in point here is that Wes Streeting would not have a clean DBS check
item.description: Case in point here is that Wes Streeting would not have a clean DBS check

item.title: Novara Media: Andy Burnham to Back Labour’s Trump-Inspired Immigration Crackdown
item.description: Andy Burnham to Back Labour’s Trump-Inspired Immigration Crackdown

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Burnham understands the power of political theatre – smart from @marthadacombe.bsky.social on why the biggest difference with Starmer may be style rather than substance. www.arguably.uk/p/andy-burnh...
item.description: Burnham understands the power of political theatre – smart from @marthadacombe.bsky.social on why the biggest difference with Starmer may be style rather than substance. www.arguably.uk/p/andy-burnh...

item.title: The Times: Kemi Badenoch accuses Keir Starmer of buying ‘dirty Russian oil’ - The Times
item.description: Kemi Badenoch accuses Keir Starmer of buying ‘dirty Russian oil’ - The Times

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: This is a really good, sensible policy. I would give my right leg for the Labour leadership fight to be composed of ideas like this.
item.description: This is a really good, sensible policy. I would give my right leg for the Labour leadership fight to be composed of ideas like this.

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: So much UK political opinion is literally just whether someone "looks right" for the role. I suppose it is a mark of progress that Sunak met this criterion as much as Starmer does.
As the below implies, this 'right s...
item.description:
So much UK political opinion is literally just whether someone "looks right" for the role. I suppose it is a mark of progress that Sunak met this criterion as much as Starmer does.
As the below implies, this 'right s...
